section: # -- client_assets.csv: Home/cash/special assets, notes, HSA, DAF, hybrid LTC, and liquidity buffers.

label: value

notes: Auto | Boat | Start-up Equity | Art | Collectible | Other; choose the broad asset type.

label: name
notes: User-described asset name.

label: value
notes: Estimated value as of the as-of date.

label: as_of_date
notes: Date the value estimate was prepared.

label: annual_appreciation_pct
notes: Annual appreciation (+) or depreciation (-).

label: basis

label: type
notes: Auto | Boat | Start-up Equity | Art | Collectible | Other; choose the broad asset type.

label: name
notes: User-described asset name.

label: value
notes: Estimated value as of the as-of date.

label: as_of_date
notes: Date the value estimate was prepared.

label: annual_appreciation_pct
notes: Annual appreciation (+) or depreciation (-).

label: basis
notes: Purchase price or tax basis for appreciating assets.

label: sell_date
notes: Optional planned sale date.

label: reserve_account
notes: Taxable/Trust | Roth | IRA | HSA | Cash; account bucket intended to preserve the reserve for this rule.

label: hsa_withdrawal_mode
notes: spend_as_needed | annual_pct | smooth_window; default spend_as_needed uses HSA only when needed before Roth. annual_pct draws the configured percentage each active year. smooth_window spreads balance across start/end years.

label: hsa_annual_spend_pct
notes: Annual HSA draw percentage used only when hsa_withdrawal_mode is annual_pct.

label: hsa_withdrawal_start_year
notes: Optional first year for annual_pct or smooth_window HSA draw policy. Leave blank to avoid a scheduled draw.

label: hsa_withdrawal_end_year
notes: Optional last year for annual_pct or smooth_window HSA draw policy. Leave blank to avoid a scheduled draw.

label: beneficiary
notes: Beneficiary name for this 529 plan.

label: current_balance
notes: Current 529 plan balance.

label: annual_contribution
notes: Annual 529 contribution.

label: contribution_start_year
notes: First contribution year.

label: contribution_end_year
notes: Last contribution year.

label: expected_use_year
notes: Expected first use/distribution year.

label: total_cash_flow
notes: over 8 annual payments

label: last_payment
notes: balance reaches 0 after 1/2/2033

label: annual_principal_base_period
notes: fixed annual principal years 1-7

label: final_principal_2033
notes: year 8
final

label: withdrawal_window
notes: spread HSA withdrawals across years inclusive to zero balance

label: inherited_by_spouse
notes: HSA passes to surviving spouse as their own HSA at first death

label: family_annual_limit_base_year
notes: base-year HSA contribution limit for family/joint HDHP coverage

label: self_only_annual_limit_base_year
notes: base-year HSA contribution limit for self-only/individual HDHP coverage

label: catchup_amount
notes: age-55+ HSA catch-up contribution - the elderly accelerator (not indexed)

label: coverage_base_year_family_months
notes: months of family/joint HDHP coverage in 2026

label: coverage_base_year_self_only_months
notes: months of self-only/individual HDHP coverage in 2026

label: catchup_eligible
notes: TRUE if an HSA owner is age 55+ and eligible for the catch-up contribution

label: contribution_last_year
notes: last year HSA contributions are made (eligibility ends at Medicare enrollment)
